title: Aggression
description: At the start of your turn, put a random Attack from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the rest of combat.
smart_description: At the start of your turn, put [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:Attack|Attacks} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Amount:plural:it|them} for the rest of combat.
